name: Almond Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugars.
2. Add the egg yolk to the mixture.
3. Mix the baking powder with the flour.
4. Combine the dry ingredients with the wet ingredients.
5. Spread the mixture evenly in a 9x13 pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 25 minutes.
7. Place the bars of chocolate on top immediately.
8. Spread when the chocolate melts to cover the top.
9. Sprinkle with chopped almonds.
